phases.label: Source Boundary
inputs_required: source_manifest['archive_path'] — must be a readable binary file
source_manifest['sha256'] — expected SHA256 of archive_path file
phases.generator_when_absent: NONE — orchestrator has no mechanism to produce archive_path
phases.fastapi_note: FastAPI uses MANIFEST_FILE_PROXY — not a true archive. Phase 1 passes with boundary proxy, but the underlying source intake is not governed by this phase.

phases.label: Intake Verification
inputs_required: source_manifest['extracted_path'] — must be an existing directory
phases.generator_when_absent: NONE — orchestrator prints 'Re-execute PI.BLUEEDGE.CLEAN-INTAKE.01' but does not invoke it

phases.label: 40.x Structural Verification
phases.generator_when_absent: NONE — orchestrator prints 'Re-execute PI.BLUEEDGE.STRUCTURAL-PIPELINE.40X.01' but does not invoke it
phases.fastapi_note: GAP-REG-01 was resolved by external contract PI.LENS.FASTAPI.40X-STRUCTURAL-BOOTSTRAP.01 via bootstrap_fastapi_40x.py — a script not owned by or invoked by run_client_pipeline.py

phases.label: CEU Grounding Verification
phases.fastapi_note: GAP-REG-02 — grounding_state_v3.json does not exist for FastAPI. Only v2 exists. Phase 4 currently blocked. No orchestrator-owned generation path.

phases.label: Build Binding Envelope
inputs_required: IF conformance_path NOT set: source_manifest['dom_layer_path'] (field NOT defined in FastAPI source_manifest)
artifacts_generated: run_dir/binding/binding_envelope.json — generated from CEU registry + DOM layer data
phases.fail_closed_on: missing registry OR missing dom_layer_path OR (conformance path set but conformance file missing)
phases.generator_when_absent: NONE for inputs — orchestrator generates the output binding_envelope.json but CANNOT generate its required inputs
phases.fastapi_note: FastAPI source_manifest.json is missing 'dom_layer_path' and 'integration_validation_path' fields. Phase 5 would KeyError without fastapi_conformance_path set. Neither missing field is generated by any prior pipeline phase.

phases.label: 75.x Activation + 41.x Projection
inputs_required: source_manifest['fastapi_conformance_path'] (optional) — if set, copies pre-computed signal/pressure artifacts
IF conformance_path NOT set: scripts/pios/run_end_to_end.py + run_dir/binding/binding_envelope.json
phases.fail_closed_on: run_end_to_end.py missing OR subprocess non-zero exit OR expected outputs absent

phases.label: Vault Construction
inputs_required: source_manifest['grounding_state_path'] — must exist (v3 expected by schema refs in code)
source_manifest['dom_layer_path'] — field NOT defined in FastAPI source_manifest
source_manifest['integration_validation_path'] — field NOT defined in FastAPI source_manifest
source_manifest['fastapi_conformance_path'] (optional) — if set, loads canonical signal_registry + signal_projection
phases.fail_closed_on: grounding_state_path missing OR dom_layer_path missing OR integration_validation_path missing
phases.fastapi_note: FastAPI source_manifest.json missing 'dom_layer_path' and 'integration_validation_path'. Phase 8a would fail with KeyError for non-conformance path runs.

phases.label: Lens Reports
artifacts_generated: clients/<alias>/lens/runs/<run_id>/ — full report tree (index, manifest, reports, graph_state)
phases.fail_closed_on: lens_report_generator.py missing OR subprocess non-zero exit

phases.label: Selector Update
phases.fail_closed_on: never — creates selector dir if absent
